languageSelector.successDescription: You can change this setting at any time in the Settings menu after logging in.

hero.title: Connect with Volunteer Mentors
hero.description: Find guidance, share experiences, and grow together. Our platform connects you with volunteer mentors for free mentorship sessions.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Our platform makes it easy to connect with mentors and schedule sessions

step1.title: Find a Mentor
step1.description: Browse our diverse community of volunteer mentors and find the perfect match for your needs.

step2.title: Schedule a Session
step2.description: Book a time that works for both of you using our integrated scheduling system.

step3.title: Connect & Grow
step3.description: Meet virtually, share experiences, and develop your skills with personalized guidance.

featuredMentors.title: Featured Mentors
featuredMentors.description: Meet some of our dedicated volunteer mentors

mentor.description: Senior Developer with 10+ years of experience helping new programmers navigate the tech industry.

events.title: Upcoming Events
events.description: Join our community events and group mentorship sessions

card.title: Tech Career Panel: Breaking Into the Industry
card.description: Join our panel of industry experts as they share insights on how to start and grow your career in technology.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.description: Join us today and connect with people who can help you achieve your goals

ourMission.title: Our Mission
ourMission.description: Simplifying mentorship into open conversations. Anyone can share their experience with those seeking it, always for free.

whyWeStarted.title: Why We Started
whyWeStarted.paragraph1: Menvo was born from a simple idea: everyone deserves access to mentorship, regardless of their background or financial situation. We believe that sharing knowledge and experiences can transform lives and communities.
whyWeStarted.paragraph2: Our founder experienced firsthand the impact that good mentorship can have on personal and professional growth. However, they also saw how mentorship opportunities were often limited to those with existing connections or financial resources.
whyWeStarted.paragraph3: That's why we created a platform that makes mentorship accessible to all, connecting those who seek guidance with those willing to share their experience – completely free of charge.

community.title: Community
community.description: Building a supportive community where knowledge is freely shared and connections are made across backgrounds and borders.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Making mentorship accessible to everyone, regardless of their financial situation, location, or background.

impact.title: Impact
impact.description: Creating positive change by empowering individuals through knowledge sharing and meaningful connections.

sdg.title: Sustainable Development Goals
sdg.description: Our platform aligns with the United Nations' Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), particularly focusing on:

ourTeam.title: Our Team
ourTeam.paragraph1: We're a diverse team of professionals passionate about making mentorship accessible to everyone. Our team members come from various backgrounds and industries, bringing together a wealth of experience and perspectives.
ourTeam.paragraph2: What unites us is our belief in the power of mentorship to transform lives and our commitment to creating a platform that facilitates meaningful connections.
ourTeam.paragraph3: We're always looking for passionate individuals to join our mission. If you're interested in contributing to Menvo, we'd love to hear from you!

ourImpact.title: Our Impact
ourImpact.description: These numbers represent real people whose lives have been positively impacted through mentorship connections on our platform.

ourPartners.title: Our Partners
ourPartners.description: We're proud to collaborate with organizations that share our vision of making mentorship accessible to all.

joinOurMission.title: Join Our Mission
joinOurMission.description: Whether you're looking to share your expertise as a mentor or seeking guidance as a mentee, you can be part of our mission to make mentorship accessible to all.

howItWorks.title: How Menvo Works
howItWorks.description: Our platform makes it easy to connect with mentors and schedule free mentorship sessions

step1.title: Create Your Profile
step1.description: Sign up and create your profile with details about your background, goals, and interests. This helps us match you with the right mentors.

step2.title: Find the Right Mentor
step2.description: Browse our diverse community of volunteer mentors. Use filters to find mentors based on expertise, industry, location, and more.

step3.title: Schedule a Session
step3.description: Once you find a mentor you'd like to connect with, view their availability and schedule a free 45-minute mentorship session.
step3.feature3: Add topics you'd like to discuss

step4.title: Connect and Grow
step4.description: Meet with your mentor via video call. Share your challenges, ask questions, and receive personalized guidance to help you achieve your goals.

step1.title: Create Your Mentor Profile
step1.description: Sign up and create your mentor profile with details about your expertise, experience, and the topics you can help with.
step1.feature2: Specify topics you can mentor on

step2.title: Complete Verification
step2.description: For the safety of our community, all mentors go through a verification process. This includes a brief video call with our team.

step3.title: Set Your Availability
step3.description: Define when you're available to mentor. You have full control over your schedule and can update it anytime.

step4.title: Conduct Mentorship Sessions
step4.description: Connect with mentees via video calls. Share your knowledge, provide guidance, and help them navigate their challenges.

step1.title: Register Your NGO for Free
step1.description: NGOs and social organizations can register for free on the platform to connect the youth they serve with volunteer mentors.

step2.title: Connect Youth with Mentors
step2.description: Register the young people served by your organization and help them find mentors who can guide them in their professional and personal journeys.
step2.feature1: Register multiple youth from your organization

step1.title: Corporate Volunteering through Mentorship
step1.description: Develop corporate volunteering programs by allowing your employees to become volunteer mentors, strengthening the company's purpose.

step2.title: ESG Reports and Social Impact
step2.description: Receive detailed reports on the social impact of mentorships conducted by your employees, strengthening your ESG metrics.

step3.title: Incentive Policies and Benefits
step3.description: Create incentive policies for mentor employees, such as paid time off, internal recognition, and career development.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about the platform.

q1.question: Is mentorship really free?
q1.answer: Yes, all mentorship sessions on our platform are completely free. Our mentors volunteer their time to help others grow and develop.

q2.question: How long are mentorship sessions?
q2.answer: Standard mentorship sessions are 45 minutes long. This provides enough time for meaningful conversation while respecting everyone's schedules.

q3.question: How often can I meet with a mentor?
q3.answer: This depends on the mentor's availability and preferences. Some mentors are open to regular sessions, while others may prefer one-time meetings.

q4.question: What happens if I need to cancel?
q4.answer: We ask that you cancel at least 24 hours in advance out of respect for the mentor's time. You can easily reschedule through your dashboard.

q5.question: How do I become a verified mentor?
q5.answer: After creating your mentor profile, you'll need to schedule a brief verification call with our team. This helps ensure the quality and safety of our community.

q6.question: Is my information secure?
q6.answer: Yes, we take privacy and security seriously. Your personal information is protected and only shared with those you choose to connect with.

faq.supportDescription: Our support team is here to help you with any questions you may have.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about the Menvo platform.

q1.question: Is mentorship really free?
q1.answer: Yes, all mentorship sessions on our platform are completely free. Our mentors volunteer their time to help others grow.

q2.question: How long are mentorship sessions?
q2.answer: Standard mentorship sessions last 45 minutes. This provides enough time for a meaningful conversation while respecting everyone's schedule.

q3.question: How often can I meet with a mentor?
q3.answer: This depends on the mentor's availability and preferences. Some mentors are open to regular sessions, while others prefer one-time meetings.

q4.question: What happens if I need to cancel?
q4.answer: We ask that you cancel at least 24 hours in advance out of respect for the mentor's time. You can easily reschedule through your dashboard.

q5.question: How do I become a verified mentor?
q5.answer: After creating your mentor profile, you'll need to schedule a brief verification call with our team. This helps ensure the quality and safety of our community.

q6.question: Is my information safe?
q6.answer: Yes, we take privacy and security very seriously. Your personal information is protected and only shared with those you choose to connect with.

q7.question: How does it work for NGOs?
q7.answer: NGOs can register for free and connect the youth they serve with volunteer mentors. It's a way to expand the organization's social impact at no cost.

q8.question: Can companies participate?
q8.answer: Yes! Companies can develop corporate volunteering programs through mentorship, receive ESG reports, and create incentive policies for mentor employees.

q9.question: How does recruiter access work?
q9.answer: This feature is under development. Soon, recruiters will have access to qualified talent participating on the platform, always respecting user privacy.

q10.question: Can I be both a mentor and mentee?
q10.answer: Yes! You can have both profiles on the platform. Many professionals seek mentorship in specific areas while mentoring in their areas of expertise.

faq.supportDescription: Our support team is here to help you with any questions you may have.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data at Menvo.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.text: We collect information you provide when creating an account, such as name, email, profile photo, and professional details. We also collect social login data (Google, LinkedIn) if you choose to authenticate with these platforms.

email.title: Emails & Communication
email.text: We use your email for essential communications, mentorship notifications, and updates. Emails are sent via Brevo, respecting your privacy and opt-out preferences.

photos.title: Photos & Visual Content
photos.text: Profile photos and uploaded images are securely stored in Supabase and used only for identification and profile personalization.

storage.title: Data Storage
storage.text: All data is securely stored in Supabase, with access restricted to the Menvo team and following best security practices.

googleCalendar.title: Google Calendar API
googleCalendar.text: We use the Google Calendar API exclusively to create mentorship events when a session is confirmed by the mentor. We create the event in our own calendar and send email invitations to both mentor and mentee. We do NOT access, read, or modify your personal Google Calendar. You only receive an email invitation that you can freely accept or decline. The data used is only: date, time, session duration, and participants' emails.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.text: We do not share your personal data with third parties for commercial or marketing purposes. Data is shared only with essential services for platform operation: Supabase (secure storage), Brevo (transactional email delivery), Google (OAuth authentication and calendar event creation), and LinkedIn (OAuth authentication). Each service processes data only for the specific purposes described in this policy.

dataUsage.title: Data Usage
dataUsage.text: Your data is used exclusively to: (1) Authenticate and manage your account; (2) Facilitate connections between mentors and mentees; (3) Create mentorship events in Google Calendar; (4) Send notifications and communications related to your mentorships; (5) Improve platform experience and security. We never use your data for AI/ML model training or purposes unrelated to mentorship.

mentorship.title: Mentorship & Interactions
mentorship.text: Information about mentorship sessions, reviews, and messages is used to improve the experience and ensure community safety.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.text: We use third-party services such as Google (OAuth login and Calendar API), LinkedIn (OAuth login), Supabase (storage), and Brevo (emails). Each service has its own privacy policy and processes data only for the specific purposes described in this policy.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.text: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your data at any time. To exercise your rights or revoke Google Calendar access permissions, contact us at contato@menvo.com.br.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: Questions about privacy? Contact us at contato@menvo.com.br.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: We use cookies to enhance your experience, ensure essential features, and analyze platform usage.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.text: Required for site operation, authentication, and security. Cannot be disabled.

social.title: Social Login
social.text: Cookies may be used for authentication via Google and LinkedIn, enabling secure login.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.text: We store your language and settings preferences to personalize your experience.

analytics.title: Analytics & Performance
analytics.text: We use cookies and analytics tools like Microsoft Clarity to understand how the platform is used and improve our services. Clarity helps us visualize how users interact with the site through session recordings and heatmaps. For users from the European Union (EEA), United Kingdom, and Switzerland, we request your explicit consent before activating these analytics tools.

clarity.title: Microsoft Clarity
clarity.text: We use Microsoft Clarity to understand how you use our website through behavioral metrics, heatmaps, and session recordings. Data collected by Clarity is processed according to Microsoft's Privacy Policy. For users from the EEA, UK, and Switzerland, Clarity will only be activated after your explicit consent through the cookie banner.

cookieConsent.title: We use cookies
cookieConsent.description: We use essential cookies for site functionality and analytics cookies to improve your experience. You can choose which cookies to accept.

settings.title: Cookie Settings
settings.description: Choose which types of cookies you want to accept. Necessary cookies cannot be disabled.

necessary.title: Necessary Cookies
necessary.description: Essential for basic site functionality, including authentication, security, and navigation.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand how you use the site to improve your experience.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.description: Enable advanced features like language preferences and personalization.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using Menvo, you agree to these terms. Please read carefully to understand your rights and responsibilities.

usage.title: Platform Usage
usage.text: Menvo connects mentors and mentees for free sessions. Use must be respectful and in accordance with applicable laws.

account.title: Account & Social Login
account.text: You may create an account via email or social login (Google, LinkedIn). Keep your credentials secure and do not share your account.

security.title: Security
security.text: We take measures to protect your data, but you are also responsible for keeping your password secure.

content.title: Content & Photos
content.text: You are responsible for content you upload (photos, text). Do not upload offensive or copyrighted content without permission.

communication.title: Communication & Emails
communication.text: We will send important communications about mentorships and updates. You may opt out of promotional emails.

storage.title: Storage & Third Parties
storage.text: Data is stored in Supabase and emails are sent via Brevo. We use third-party social login.

rights.title: Rights & Responsibilities
rights.text: You may access and delete your data. Misuse of the platform may result in account suspension.
